en_title: Video Games Could Have Movie-Style Product Placement to Counter Rising Costs, Ex-Dragon Age Boss Says
cn_title: 前《龙腾世纪》制作人：游戏可学电影植入广告降成本
subtitle: 不差钱
opus_summary: 前BioWare《龙腾世纪》制作人Mark Darrah指出，3A游戏开发成本飙升，可借鉴电影植入广告模式。他以《蓝精灵》真人电影靠植入广告收回全部成本为例，认为游戏行业过度依赖内购和通行证，导致玩法同质化。他建议游戏探索产品植入等新收入来源，避免所有3A游戏都变成服务型游戏。

paragraphs.en: As big budget video game development gets more costly, including TV and movie-style product placement could help make up the shortfall, BioWare's former Dragon Age boss Mark Darrah has said.
paragraphs.cn: 随着大预算电子游戏开发成本越来越高，BioWare前《龙腾世纪》负责人Mark Darrah表示，加入电视和电影式的产品植入或许能弥补资金缺口。

paragraphs.en: In a lengthy video discussing the future of video game monetization, Darrah noted the rise of AAA games including live-service elements to ensure owners kept playing — and paying — long after release.
paragraphs.cn: 在一段讨论电子游戏盈利模式未来的长视频中，Darrah指出，越来越多3A游戏加入服务型元素，以确保玩家在发售后长期游玩——并持续付费。

paragraphs.en: Many video games rely on post-launch content or live-service elements to ensure projects earn back the huge sums of money spent developing them in the first place, with big budget games now regularly costing hundreds of millions to make. But not every game can succeed with these models, Darrah said, meaning that there needed to be other ways for developers to pay the bills.
paragraphs.cn: 许多电子游戏依赖发售后内容或服务型元素，来确保项目能收回最初投入的巨额开发成本，如今大预算游戏的制作费用动辄数亿美元。但Darrah表示，并非每款游戏都能靠这些模式成功，这意味着开发者需要其他方式来维持生计。

paragraphs.en: "My understanding is the live-action Smurfs movie paid for itself entirely through product placement," Darrah said, "so the movie was effectively made for zero dollars simply through the sale of product placement. Contrast that with the way that games make money."
paragraphs.cn: 「据我所知，《蓝精灵》真人电影完全靠植入广告收回了成本，」Darrah说，「所以这部电影实际上是通过出售植入广告，以零成本制作出来的。这与游戏的赚钱方式形成鲜明对比。」

paragraphs.en: The existence of subscription programs such as Xbox Game Pass and PlayStation Plus was not a cure-all either, he continued, noting that "a lot of games make very little [money]" from being included, and suggesting that these offerings risked encouraging "degenerative design in order to try to juice the numbers."
paragraphs.cn: 他接着说，Xbox Game Pass和PlayStation Plus这类订阅服务也并非万能药，并指出「很多游戏从加入订阅中赚到的钱非常少」，还暗示这些服务可能助长「为了刷数据而进行的退化性设计」。

paragraphs.en: "The over-reliance on microtransactions is overemphasizing certain genres and stopping others from flourishing," Darrah noted. "Everything can't be a live-service, which is something I hope we've proven pretty definitively over the past year and a half, and if monetization is coming predominantly from live-services, we run the risk of living in a world where there are no AAA games that aren't live-services. And I don't think that's a world that any of us want to live in."
paragraphs.cn: 「对微交易的过度依赖，正在过分强调某些游戏类型，并阻碍其他类型的发展，」Darrah指出。「不可能所有游戏都做成服务型，我希望过去一年半已经相当明确地证明了这一点。如果盈利主要来自服务型游戏，我们就有可能生活在一个所有3A游戏都是服务型游戏的世界里。我不认为那是我们任何人想要的世界。」

paragraphs.en: Sony has pulled back significantly on its previous live-action service game plans, partly due to the failure of last year's Concord, but even prior to that when it scrapped online The Last of Us and Twisted Metal games. Meanwhile, Xbox cancelled an unannounced MMO from ZeniMax Online Studios, the maker of The Elder Scrolls Online.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼已大幅收缩其先前的服务型游戏计划，部分原因是去年《星鸣特攻》的失败，但在此之前，它就砍掉了《最后生还者》和《烈火战车》的在线游戏。与此同时，Xbox取消了ZeniMax Online Studios一款未公布的MMO，该工作室是《上古卷轴Online》的开发商。

paragraphs.en: "So, is there an opportunity for games to take a step back and think about different ways that we could make money? I think there is," Darrah concluded. "Product placement is a very small part of video games right now compared to movies and television. Maybe it could be a larger part of development. Maybe there are relationships there to be formed."
paragraphs.cn: 「那么，游戏行业是否有机会退一步，思考不同的赚钱方式？我认为是有的，」Darrah总结道。「与电影和电视相比，产品植入目前在电子游戏中只占很小一部分。也许它可以成为开发中更大的一部分。也许可以建立一些合作关系。」

paragraphs.en: Darrah served as executive producer on every major Dragon Age game at BioWare over a career lasting nearly two decades. Previously, he's discussed how the poorly-received Dragon Age: The Veilguard began life as a live-service game before being rebooted — even if some elements from this version of the project remained. Ironically, The Veilguard's commercial failure prompted publisher after all — something that fans of the franchise vehemently disagreed with.
paragraphs.cn: Darrah在BioWare近二十年的职业生涯中，担任了每一款主要《龙腾世纪》游戏的执行制作人。此前，他曾讨论过口碑不佳的《龙腾世纪：帷幕守护者》最初是一款服务型游戏，后来才被重启——尽管该项目的这一版本仍保留了一些元素。讽刺的是，《帷幕守护者》的商业失败最终促使发行商考虑转向服务型游戏——而系列粉丝对此强烈反对。

paragraphs.en: Still, it's hard to imagine The Veilguard being saved with product placement — or suggest what could have been included as possible options. Maybe Rook could have called in the guy on the horse from the Old Spice adverts for the final battle? Or chugged down on a refreshing Mountain Dew-flavoured Fereldan ale as a power up? Or dressed in beskar battle armor to help promote The Mandalorian and Grogu? Maybe a live-service Dragon Age wouldn't have been so bad after all.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，很难想象《帷幕守护者》能靠植入广告挽救——或者能植入些什么。也许Rook可以在最终决战时召唤Old Spice广告里骑马的男人？或者灌下一杯激爽的美年达口味费雷登麦酒来提升能力？或者穿上贝斯卡战斗盔甲来宣传《曼达洛人与古古》？也许服务型《龙腾世纪》终究没那么糟。

paragraphs.en: Darrah has now left BioWare, but the studio continues on — solely focused on making a fresh Mass Effect game, which still lacks a release date.
paragraphs.cn: Darrah现已离开BioWare，但工作室仍在继续——专注于制作一款全新的《质量效应》游戏，该作目前尚未公布发售日期。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。您可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
